text_block_list.text:
Today is the start of summer camp, where racers
train to improve their skills.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I can't believe it's been a whole year! Man,
this place sure brings back memories.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Remember how panicked you were about me last
year? Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm just messin' with ya. Honestly, now that I think
of it, that was probably my fault.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I hadn't done enough to make sure you had full
faith in me then.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
How are you feeling now, though? You aren't
feelin' anxious or anything, are you?

Hishi Amazon's skills are nothing short of
amazing. Her performance at the Osaka Hai and
the Yasuda Kinen completely astounded me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hehe, well that's good to hear!

And so, Hishi Amazon's blazing summer camp
begins!
